basic_details.job_title: CDPO Poshan Batwara Anganwadi Helper Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: Child Development Project Office Poshan Batwara
basic_details.short_information: Child Development Project Office Poshan Batwara (CDPO Poshan Batwara) Sahayika (Anganwadi Helper) Notification 2026 has been released on 25 May 2026. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the CDPO Poshan Batwara Sahayika (Anganwadi Helper) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 37 years

qualification.details: Anganwadi Helper (Gasoo A): Matriculation (or 8th standard if no matriculate available in the ward) Anganwadi Helper (Gagribal): Matriculation (or 8th standard if no matriculate available in the ward)

selection_process: Committee selection based on eligibility criteria preferring most destitute/needy married woman of the ward
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for CDPO Poshan Batwara Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 15-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Sahayika (Anganwadi Helper) posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Sahayika (Anganwadi Helper) posts is 15th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this date.

faq.question: Q2. What are the minimum and maximum age limits for the Sahayika (Anganwadi Helper) posts?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement is 18 years, and the maximum age limit is 37 years for all Sahayika (Anganwadi Helper) posts. Age relaxation details are available in the official notification.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Sahayika (Anganwadi Helper) posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must have completed Matriculation. However, an 8th standard pass will be considered if no matriculate candidates are available in the specific ward.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Sahayika (Anganwadi Helper) posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the Sahayika (Anganwadi Helper) posts. These are distributed across two specific locations: Gasoo A and Gagribal.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form, fill it, and send it to the official address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the Sahayika (Anganwadi Helper) posts?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the Sahayika (Anganwadi Helper) posts. The application is free of cost.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Sahayika (Anganwadi Helper) posts?
faq.answer: The selection will be based on a committee's decision, prioritizing eligible candidates who are most destitute or needy married women residing in the respective ward.

faq.question: Q8. Which organization is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being conducted by the Child Development Project Office Poshan Batwara (CDPO Poshan Batwara).

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is 78 of 2026.

faq.question: Q10. In which state and city is this recruitment taking place?
faq.answer: This recruitment is taking place in the state of Jammu and Kashmir, specifically in the city of Srinagar.
